overview.what: A personalized recommendation system using the Collaborative Filtering approach. It predicts a user's interest in items based on the preferences of similar users, a technique used by Netflix and Amazon.
overview.how_it_works: The engine constructs a user-item rating matrix and calculates the cosine similarity between users. It then identifies the 'top neighbors' for a target user and recommends the highest-rated items that the user hasn't seen yet.

files.description: Collaborative filtering logic using cosine similarity.
files.code:
import pandas as pd
from sklearn.metrics.pairwise import cosine_similarity
import numpy as np

def get_recommendations(user_ratings, target_user_idx):
    # Calculate similarities
    similarity_matrix = cosine_similarity(user_ratings)
    user_sim = similarity_matrix[target_user_idx]
    
    # Weighted ratings
    scores = user_sim.dot(user_ratings) / np.array([np.abs(user_sim).sum()])
    return scores
